# programs.throne

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.throne`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.throne.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Throne, a GUI proxy configuration manager. |
| `programs.throne.package` | `package` | The throne package to use. |
| `programs.throne.tunMode.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable TUN mode of Throne. |
| `programs.throne.tunMode.setuid` | `boolean` | Whether to enable setting suid bit for ThroneCore to run as root, which is less secure than default setcap method but closer to upstream assumptions. Enable this if you find the default setcap method configured in this module doesn't work for you . |
